forecasts.detailed: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 56. Southeast wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
